title: Kalmeida
compiled_truth: Kalmeida is an external contact at [CAISO](companies/caiso). Over the corpus period (2000-06-21 to 2002-02-04), Kalmeida sent 60 and received 31 emails, totalling 91 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Stokley](people/chris-stokley) (40), [Donna Johnson](people/donna-johnson) (22), [P  O'Neil](people/p-o-neil) (16), [Bill Williams](people/bill-williams) (13), [H  Foster](people/h-foster) (12).
